meta.name: harness-kit
meta.description: Project-agnostic AI agent harness with stage orchestration, bounded loops, and MCP context tools.

profiles.name: feature
profiles.description: Full feature delivery through the complete stage machine.

profiles.name: review
profiles.description: Independent review path without an implementation handoff.

profiles.name: turnkey-coding
profiles.description: Turnkey coding delivery from understanding through final feedback.

profiles.name: multi-agent-orchestration
profiles.description: Design and implement orchestration behavior with full gate and review coverage.

profiles.name: drop-in-memory
profiles.description: Integrate memory/state capabilities with architectural checks and deep review.

intents.description: Ship feature work in a full harness cycle.
Plan or implement multi-agent orchestration and handoff behavior.
Add persistent memory/state features and retrieval flows.

tools.name: graph-status
tools.description: Returns graph freshness and drift against HEAD.

tools.name: graph-neighbors
tools.description: Returns neighboring nodes for a graph node id.

tools.name: graph-dependents
tools.description: Returns files that depend on a file path.

tools.name: graph-path
tools.description: Returns a shortest path between two node ids.

tools.name: graph-layers
tools.description: Returns all architectural layers and counts.

tools.name: graph-layer
tools.description: Returns all nodes in a named layer.

tools.name: graph-hubs
tools.description: Returns highest-degree hubs.

tools.name: memory-list
tools.description: Lists harness memory entries with summaries.

tools.name: memory-read
tools.description: Reads a memory markdown entry by name.

tools.name: memory-search
tools.description: Searches memory entries by filename, summary, and body.

tools.name: memory-link-status
tools.description: Reports status of the memory-link dual index.

tools.name: memory-link-search
tools.description: Searches memory-to-code links captured by the memory-link index.

tools.name: vector-status
tools.description: Reports local vector-index status and corpus coverage.

tools.name: vector-index
tools.description: Builds or refreshes local embeddings for memory and graph corpora.

tools.name: vector-search
tools.description: Runs semantic retrieval over the local vector index.

tools.name: harness-loops
tools.description: Lists available harness loops (convergence/workflow/experiment) with kind, description, and metric. Read-only; loops are executed via the CLI, not over MCP.

tools.name: harness-report
tools.description: Returns aggregated harness metrics (loops, checks, rubric, experiments, recent runs, memory) as JSON. Read-only.

tools.name: harness-catalog
tools.description: Returns the machine-readable harness catalog with taxonomy tiers, intent profiles, and MCP capability metadata.

tools.name: harness-pick-profile
tools.description: Maps a task (and optional explicit intent) to the recommended harness routing profile and stages.

tools.name: harness-tool-discover
tools.description: Finds relevant harness MCP tools by intent, tags, and free-text query for on-demand tool routing.
